'''鈭歡-dh-k''' ('''kagadhak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quine|quine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quine|quine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-dh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kagadhak
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigadhak|thigadhak]] || [[word:jigadhak|jigadhak]] || [[word:shigadhak|shigadhak]] || [[word:kigadhak|kigadhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugadhak|thuthugadhak]] || [[word:jujugadhak|jujugadhak]] || [[word:shushugadhak|shushugadhak]] || [[word:kukugadhak|kukugadhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugadhak|thugadhak]] || [[word:jugadhak|jugadhak]] || [[word:shugadhak|shugadhak]] || [[word:kugadhak|kugadhak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugadhak|thugadhak]] || [[word:jugadhak|jugadhak]] || [[word:shugadhak|shugadhak]] || [[word:kugadhak|kugadhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegadhak|thegadhak]] || [[word:jegadhak|jegadhak]] || [[word:shegadhak|shegadhak]] || [[word:kegadhak|kegadhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogadhak|thothogadhak]] || [[word:jojogadhak|jojogadhak]] || [[word:shoshogadhak|shoshogadhak]] || [[word:kokogadhak|kokogadhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogadhak|thogadhak]] || [[word:jogadhak|jogadhak]] || [[word:shogadhak|shogadhak]] || [[word:kogadhak|kogadhak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogadhak|thogadhak]] || [[word:jogadhak|jogadhak]] || [[word:shogadhak|shogadhak]] || [[word:kogadhak|kogadhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]] || [[word:gadhak|gadhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gadhak|th忙gadhak]] || [[word:j忙gadhak|j忙gadhak]] || [[word:sh忙gadhak|sh忙gadhak]] || [[word:k忙gadhak|k忙gadhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagadhak|thathagadhak]] || [[word:jajagadhak|jajagadhak]] || [[word:shashagadhak|shashagadhak]] || [[word:kakagadhak|kakagadhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagadhak|thagadhak]] || [[word:jagadhak|jagadhak]] || [[word:shagadhak|shagadhak]] || [[word:kagadhak|kagadhak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagadhak|thagadhak]] || [[word:jagadhak|jagadhak]] || [[word:shagadhak|shagadhak]] || [[word:kagadhak|kagadhak]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagadhak|shagadhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagadhak|goshagadhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagadhak|gokishagadhak]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagadhakn眉|shagadhakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkn眉|goshagadhaknkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhakn眉|gokishagadhakn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagadhaksh毛|shagadhaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagadhaknksh毛|goshagadhaknksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagadhaksh毛|gokishagadhaksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhakro|shagadhakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkro|goshagadhaknkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhakro|gokishagadhakro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhakmu|shagadhakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkmu|goshagadhaknkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhakmu|gokishagadhakmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagadhaksher|shagadhaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagadhaknksher|goshagadhaknksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagadhaksher|gokishagadhaksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagadhakng|shagadhakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkng|goshagadhaknkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagadhakng|gokishagadhakng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagadhakya|shagadhakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkya|goshagadhaknkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagadhakya|gokishagadhakya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagadhakyam|shagadhakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkyam|goshagadhaknkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagadhakyam|gokishagadhakyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhakn眉sh毛|shagadhakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkn眉sh毛|goshagadhaknkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhakn眉sh毛|gokishagadhakn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhakn眉ro|shagadhakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkn眉ro|goshagadhaknkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhakn眉ro|gokishagadhakn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhakn眉mu|shagadhakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkn眉mu|goshagadhaknkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhakn眉mu|gokishagadhakn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhaksh毛n眉|shagadhaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhaknksh毛n眉|goshagadhaknksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhaksh毛n眉|gokishagadhaksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhaksh毛ro|shagadhaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhaknksh毛ro|goshagadhaknksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhaksh毛ro|gokishagadhaksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhaksh毛mu|shagadhaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhaknksh毛mu|goshagadhaknksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhaksh毛mu|gokishagadhaksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhakron眉|shagadhakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkron眉|goshagadhaknkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhakron眉|gokishagadhakron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhakrosh毛|shagadhakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkrosh毛|goshagadhaknkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhakrosh毛|gokishagadhakrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagadhakromu|shagadhakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkromu|goshagadhaknkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagadhakromu|gokishagadhakromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagadhakmun眉|shagadhakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkmun眉|goshagadhaknkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagadhakmun眉|gokishagadhakmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagadhakmush毛|shagadhakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkmush毛|goshagadhaknkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagadhakmush毛|gokishagadhakmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagadhakmuro|shagadhakmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagadhaknkmuro|goshagadhaknkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagadhakmuro|gokishagadhakmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
